memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t out1[32], uint8_t out2[32], const uint8_t ck[32], const uint8_t *input, size_t input_len)
memberdef.name: wg_hkdf2

detaileddescription.para:
HKDF-Extract + Expand producing 2 outputs.
out1 out2
Output buffers (32 bytes each).
ck
Chaining key (32 bytes).
input
Input data.
input_len
Length of input data.

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t out1[32], uint8_t out2[32], uint8_t out3[32], const uint8_t ck[32], const uint8_t *input, size_t input_len)
memberdef.name: wg_hkdf3

detaileddescription.para:
HKDF-Extract + Expand producing 3 outputs.
out1 out2 out3
Output buffers (32 bytes each).
ck
Chaining key (32 bytes).
input
Input data.
input_len
Length of input data.

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t ck[32], uint8_t k[32], const uint8_t *input, size_t len)
memberdef.name: wg_mix_key

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t h[32], const uint8_t k[32], const uint8_t *plain, size_t plain_len, uint8_t *ct, uint8_t tag[16])
memberdef.name: wg_encrypt_and_hash

briefdescription.para: Encrypt-and-hash: encrypt plaintext, mix ciphertext+tag into hash.

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t h[32], const uint8_t k[32], const uint8_t *ct, size_t ct_len, const uint8_t tag[16], uint8_t *plain)
memberdef.name: wg_decrypt_and_hash

briefdescription.para: Decrypt-and-hash: verify + decrypt, mix ciphertext+tag into hash.

simplesect.para: true if decryption and verification succeeded.

briefdescription.para: Write a 12-byte TAI64N timestamp from NTP time.

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t mac[16], const uint8_t peer_pub[32], const uint8_t *msg, size_t msg_len)
memberdef.name: wg_mac1

briefdescription.para: Compute mac1 = keyed BLAKE2s(HASH("mac1----" || peer_pub), msg).
Build and send a Noise_IKpsk2 handshake initiation message.

simplesect.para: true if message was built and sent.

briefdescription.para: Parse and validate a handshake response, deriving session keys.

simplesect.para: true if response was valid and session established.

briefdescription.para: Send an IP packet through the WireGuard tunnel.

detaileddescription.para: Encrypts the packet with the current session key and sends it as a WireGuard transport message.

simplesect.para: SYN_OK on success, SYN_ERROR if no session or send failed.

briefdescription.para: Anti-replay check using a sliding window bitmap.

simplesect.para: true if counter is new and within window.

briefdescription.para: Decrypt and deliver an incoming WireGuard transport message.

simplesect.para: true if message was valid and delivered.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_WG *wg, const SYN_WgConfig *config, SYN_SNTP *sntp, uint8_t *rx_buf, size_t rx_buf_size, uint8_t *tx_buf, size_t tx_buf_size)
memberdef.name: syn_wg_init

detaileddescription.para: Derives the public key from the private key and prepares state. Does NOT open a socket or start a handshake — that happens when the protothread task runs.

parameterdescription.para: SNTP time source (must be initialized, may not be synced yet).

briefdescription.para: Cooperative protothread task — drives the WireGuard client.

detaileddescription.para: Handles: NTP sync wait, handshake, incoming packet processing, keepalive, and rekeying. Pass the SYN_WG context via task->user_data.
Implements the WireGuard protocol per the whitepaper: https://www.wireguard.com/papers/wireguard.pdf
Noise protocol pattern: IKpsk2 Initiator (us) knows responder's static public key. PSK mixed in at handshake step 2.
